prompt: I just had a meeting with my team about RAG architectures. We discussed: chunking strategies (fixed-size vs semantic), embedding models (we compared Cohere embed-v3 and OpenAI text-embedding-3-large), and storage options (pgvector vs Chroma). We decided to benchmark pgvector this week. Attendees: me, Sarah, and Dev. Add this as a meeting note.

assertions.name: meeting-file-in-correct-folder
assertions.description: A .md file was created in sources/meeting/ with YYYY-MM-DD- prefix

assertions.name: attendees-filled
assertions.description: attendees field is populated with at least two names

assertions.name: action-items-present
assertions.description: ## Action Items section has at least one non-placeholder item (pgvector benchmark)

assertions.name: connection-fields-present
assertions.description: At least one introduces:: or supports:: inline field present

assertions.name: no-url-field
assertions.description: The note does not contain a 'url:' frontmatter field (meetings have no URL)
